title: [ExportVerilog] Not handling fused locations well
body:
When working on [this patch](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/1559) I noticed that some "before" code for this testcase:

```
 hw.module @top_mod(%sel: i2, %a: i8, %b: i8, %c: i8, %d: i8) -> (%y: i8) {
    %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
    %c1_i2 = hw.constant 1 : i2
    %c-2_i2 = hw.constant -2 : i2
    %0 = comb.icmp eq %sel, %c-2_i2 : i2
    %1 = comb.mux %0, %c, %d : i8
    %2 = comb.icmp eq %sel, %c1_i2 : i2
    %3 = comb.mux %2, %b, %1 : i8
    %4 = comb.icmp eq %sel, %c0_i2 : i2
    %5 = comb.mux %4, %a, %3 : i8
    hw.output %5 : i8
  }
```

looks like:

```
module top_mod(
  input  [1:0] sel,
  input  [7:0] a, b, c, d,
  output [7:0] y);

  assign y = sel == 2'h0 ? a : sel == 2'h1 ? b : sel == 2'h2 ? c : d;	// x.mlir:2:14, :3:14, :4:15, :5:10, :6:10, :7:10, :8:10, :9:10, :10:10, :11:5
endmodule
```

but the after code is:

```
module top_mod(
  input  [1:0] sel,
  input  [7:0] a, b, c, d,
  output [7:0] y);

  assign y = ({{a}, {b}, {c}, {d}})[sel];	// x.mlir:11:5
endmodule
```

Note that we dropped all the intermediate locations.  This is because `getLocationInfoAsString` in ExportVerilog.cpp isn't handling Fused locations.
